# Real capture: Claude Code idle on Windows (ConPTY via Minerva terminal),
# 2026-07-03, claude --dangerously-skip-permissions, 220x14 viewport.
# KEY CALIBRATION FACT: on Windows the input box renders as ASCII `> `
# (no U+276F ❯, no U+00A0 NBSP) between full-width horizontal rules.
# prompt_box_regex must match both renderings: ^[❯>]\s
● User declined to answer questions
  ⎿  · What's the north-star artifact — the first finished piece you'd want to exist and show someone? (Music video (1-3 min) / Dialogue short (3-5 min) / Full episode (~20 min) / Single perfect shot)
     · How much human direction should the finished pipeline assume? (Director's console / One-button auto / Hybrid: auto draft, human polish)
     · Is this a Minerva product capability or a personal creative tool first? (Personal tool first / Minerva feature)

● What would you like to clarify about those questions — or is there context I'm missing about the target that would reframe them?

✻ Brewed for 1m 17s
